scripts.dev: yarn base && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "yarn dev:frontend" "yarn dev:backend"
scripts.format: yarn base && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "yarn format:frontend" "yarn format:backend"
scripts.test: yarn base && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "yarn test:frontend" "yarn test:backend"
